patch.value: CodeFactor/Complexity: zero out the extension command-dispatch, policy & tool-schema contract surface (runExtension CC104)

Finish the extension/contract slice of the CodeFactor complexity epic (pm-92if) that pm-zro7 and pm-lzzp explicitly deferred. pm-zro7 cut the authoring/management/diagnostics builders but left the runExtension action dispatcher (CC=104) untouched; pm-lzzp zeroed the SDK loader/compose surface but not the tool-schema contract resolver (CC=23). Scope (behavior-preserving, 100% cov, byte-identical full.json): (1) src/cli/commands/extension.ts runExtension CC104 -> per-action handlers, resolveAction CC34, listInstalledExtensions CC25, install-lock callback CC19; (2) src/core/extensions/extension-policy.ts 3 evaluators CC30/22/18; (3) src/cli/extension-command-options.ts CC18; (4) src/sdk/cli-contracts/tool-schema.ts CC23 (zeroes the whole src/sdk complexity group). Reveal violations via: eslint <f> --suppressions-location /tmp/empty.json --rule '{"complexity":["error",{"max":17}]}'.

value.text: Evidence update: complexity baseline now drops from 146 to 113 individual ESLint complexity suppressions versus main (33 removed). The PR removes 9 suppressed file entries entirely and cuts the largest MCP dispatcher from a 100+ complexity-point hotspot into handler primitives. Verification passed: pnpm typecheck; focused suites 122 tests; full coverage 262 files / 5260 tests at 100/100/100/100; pnpm lint; pnpm contracts:check; pnpm quality:docs-links; pnpm security:scan; pnpm audit --audit-level low; pnpm changelog:pm:check with pm-changelog 2026.6.30 and unchanged CHANGELOG.md; Sentry/telemetry gate ok with 0 critical/high Sentry issues and telemetry finish_error_rate_pct 0.77; release:gates passed through build/typecheck/docs/static/full coverage/version/security/npx smoke/package-first dogfood and stopped only at Greptile because changes were not committed yet. Greptile will be rerun after commit and before push.
